arguments.summary: Read storage/mod.rs (10 lines) and storage/memory.rs (28 lines). Storage trait has 3 sync methods: get, set, delete. MemoryStorage implements them with a HashMap. Need to make trait methods async and update both implementations. Will need async-trait crate since Rust traits don't support async methods natively yet.

Need to: 1) add async-trait to Cargo.toml, 2) make Storage trait async, 3) update MemoryStorage (trivial — just add async), 4) update DiskStorage (should use tokio::fs for true async file I/O).

arguments.summary: Trait and implementations updated. Cargo check shows 2 errors in server.rs — handle_get (line 17) and handle_set (line 26) call .await but aren't async functions. Need to make them async too.
next_steps: Read server.rs and make handler methods async

arguments.summary: Made all server.rs handler methods async — handle_request, handle_get, handle_set, handle_delete. Cargo check passes with no errors.
arguments.final_answer: Refactored Storage trait to async. Changes: 1) Added async-trait 0.1 to Cargo.toml. 2) Made Storage trait methods async with #[async_trait] macro, changed error type to Box<dyn Error + Send + Sync>. 3) Updated MemoryStorage — same logic, just async. 4) Updated DiskStorage — switched from std::fs to tokio::fs for true async file I/O. 5) Made all Server handler methods async. Cargo check passes clean.
